items.name: Military Fades
items.description: Sharp, regulation-ready fades for active-duty service members from every branch, and for veterans. Done right, done fast.

items.name: Gentleman's Cuts
items.description: Short modern men's cuts and gentleman's classics, tailored to your face shape and lifestyle.

items.name: Women's & Long Haircuts
items.description: Precision cuts and shaping for women's styles and longer hair, with the same attention to detail as our barber work.

items.name: Beard Trims & Lineups
items.description: Detailed beard sculpting and crisp razor lineups for a clean, defined finish that holds for weeks.

items.name: Straight Razor Face Shaves
items.description: Hot-towel straight razor shaves done the traditional way. Smooth, refreshed, refined.

items.name: Hair Color (Men)
items.description: Refresh, blend gray, or add depth. Pricing depends on hair length and coverage.

items.name: Hair Color (Women)
items.description: All-over color, gray blending, and custom shades for women's hair. Final price depends on length.

items.name: Highlights
items.description: Highlighting services priced by how much of the head you want highlighted.

items.name: Balayage
items.description: Hand-painted color for a soft, natural-looking dimension. A premium service for premium results.

items.name: Custom Designs
items.description: Freehand designs and detailed enhancements for clients who want something a step above. Pricing varies by complexity. Call for a quote.

extras: Cash preferred. On-site ATM and card options accepted
